zh-CN.title: 为什么这个结果可信
zh-CN.body: 这份报告同时看四个维度、维度之间的差距、答题质量和内容路线。它不是只用一个总分判断你。
bullets: 四维信号：SA / ER / EM / RM
差距信号：最强维度与发展杠杆
质量信号：本次结果的解释置信度
路线信号：最相关场景和行动处方

en.title: Why this result is interpretable
en.body: This report looks at the four dimensions, the gaps between them, response quality, and the selected content route. It does not reduce you to one score.
bullets: Dimension signals: SA / ER / EM / RM
Gap signals: strongest dimension and development lever
Route signal: relevant scenes and action prescription

zh-CN.title: 30 秒读法
zh-CN.body: 先记住一句核心模式，再看一个证据点，最后只选一个行动。不要一口气把整份报告当成性格判决。

en.title: How to read this in 30 seconds
en.body: Remember one core pattern, check one evidence point, then choose one action. Do not treat the whole report as a verdict on your personality.

zh-CN.title: 现实验证法
zh-CN.body: 未来一周观察三件事：你最先读到谁的情绪、你是否能说清边界、你事后恢复需要多久。

en.title: Reality check
en.body: For the next week, observe three things: whose emotion you notice first, whether you can state a boundary, and how long recovery takes afterward.
